ValidationRule.description: Prevents editing financial fields when event is locked unless user has Finance Adjustment permission
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Wrap_Up_Locked__c = TRUE, NOT($Permission.Finance_Adjustment), OR( ISCHANGED(Quoted_Price__c), ISCHANGED(Total_Invoiced__c), ISCHANGED(Total_Collected__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This event's financial records are locked. Contact a Finance Analyst with adjustment permissions to make changes.
